response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software engineering experience, particularly in full-stack web development and DLang, he completely lacks the required native-level Japanese proficiency. Furthermore, his background does not align with the core requirements of embedded C programming, Linux kernel modification, or L2/L3 networking security protocols necessary for this LAN-switch firmware role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience across diverse tech stacks.
Prior exposure to C/C++ and building high-performance applications using DLang.
Strong foundational knowledge of Linux environments, DevOps, and system architecture.
concerns: Does not possess the required native-level Japanese language proficiency.
Lacks experience with embedded networking, LAN-switches, and L2/L3 protocols.
Missing required hands-on experience in Linux kernel modification and specific network security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X).
